title: [v5] crypto/ccp: Introduce SNP_VERIFY_MITIGATION command
summary: 引入SNP_VERIFY_MITIGATION固件命令，通过sysfs属性报告和请求验证SEV-SNP漏洞缓解措施。
series_name: [v5] crypto/ccp: Introduce SNP_VERIFY_MITIGATION command

title: [v2] crypto: authencesn - Use memcpy_from/to_sglist
summary: 将 authencesn 密码驱动中的 scatterwalk_map_and_copy 调用替换为 memcpy_from_sglist 和 memcpy_to_sglist。
series_name: [v2] crypto: authencesn - Use memcpy_from/to_sglist

title: [v2] lib/crypto: powerpc/md5: Drop powerpc optimized MD5 code
summary: 移除 PowerPC 架构的 MD5 汇编优化实现，统一使用通用 C 语言实现。
series_name: [v2] lib/crypto: powerpc/md5: Drop powerpc optimized MD5 code

title: crypto: ccp - Define pci_device_ids using named initializers
summary: 将 pci_device_id 数组的初始化方式从位置参数改为使用命名字段 .driver_data，明确指定驱动数据字段，提高代码可读性。
series_name: crypto: ccp - Define pci_device_ids using named initializers

title: crypto: ccp: Treat zero-length cert chain as query for blob lengths
summary: 允许用户空间通过将证书链长度设为零来查询PDH证书链的blob长度，而不必设置地址为零。
series_name: crypto: ccp: Treat zero-length cert chain as query for blob lengths

title: crypto: af_alg - Cap AEAD AD length to 0x80000000
summary: 该补丁在`af_alg_cmsg_send()`中增加了对AEAD关联数据长度的上限检查，拒绝大于等于`0x80000000`的值，防止溢出或安全风险。
series_name: crypto: af_alg - Cap AEAD AD length to 0x80000000

title: crypto: Move MODULE_DEVICE_TABLE next to the table itself
summary: 将 MODULE_DEVICE_TABLE 宏声明从文件末尾移动到设备 ID 表定义之后，使声明紧邻表本身。
series_name: crypto: Move MODULE_DEVICE_TABLE next to the table itself

title: crypto: drbg - Rename MAX_ADDTL => MAX_ADDTL_BYTES
summary: 将宏 `DRBG_MAX_ADDTL` 重命名为 `DRBG_MAX_ADDTL_BYTES`，以明确该最大值以字节为单位。
series_name: crypto: drbg - Rename MAX_ADDTL => MAX_ADDTL_BYTES

title: crypto: drbg - Remove support for "prediction resistance"
summary: 移除 DRBG 对预测抵抗（prediction resistance）的支持，仅保留无预测抵抗模式并简化代码。
series_name: crypto: drbg - Remove support for "prediction resistance"

title: crypto: artpec6 - refactor crypto_setup_out_descr for readability
summary: 重构函数消除 else 分支，对 short 路径提前返回，将变量声明提前并减少嵌套以提高可读性。
series_name: crypto: artpec6 - refactor crypto_setup_out_descr for readability

title: [v2] crypto: ecc - Unbreak the build on arm with CONFIG_KASAN_STACK=y
summary: 为ARM架构下启用KASAN_STACK的GCC编译，放宽ECC模块的栈帧大小限制以绕过编译器bug导致的构建中断。
series_name: [v2] crypto: ecc - Unbreak the build on arm with CONFIG_KASAN_STACK=y

title: [v5,9/9] crypto: atmel: Use dmaengine_prep_config_single() API
summary: 将 DMA 从属配置和 SG 描述符准备合并为单一调用 `dmaengine_prep_config_sg`，以简化 Atmel AES 驱动中的 DMA 传输启动代码。
series_name: dmaengine: Add new API to combine configuration and descriptor preparation

title: [v2] crypto: ccp: sev-dev-tsm: bail out early when pdev->bus is NULL
summary: 在 sev-dev-tsm 的 dsm_create 函数中，检测到 pdev->bus 为 NULL 时提前返回 -ENODEV，防止后续空指针解引用。
series_name: [v2] crypto: ccp: sev-dev-tsm: bail out early when pdev->bus is NULL

title: crypto: use designated initializers for report structs
summary: 将多个加密算法报告函数中的结构体初始化改为使用指定初始化器，直接在声明时为 `.type` 等字段赋值，替代 `memset` 清零和 `strscpy` 拷贝。
series_name: crypto: use designated initializers for report structs

title: crypto: ctr - Convert from skcipher to lskcipher
summary:
我们被要求分析一个 Linux 内核 patch 的标题和 diff 内容，用一句话概括核心改动，不超过200字符。要求直接说明做了什么改动，保持技术准确性，不使用修饰性词语。

标题: "crypto: ctr - Convert from skcipher to lskcipher"
diff 内容展示了 ctr.c 文件的修改，将 CTR 模式加密从基于 skcipher（同步块加密）接口转
series_name: crypto: ctr - Convert from skcipher to lskcipher

title: crypto: cesa - use max to simplify mv_cesa_probe
summary: 使用max()宏简化mv_cesa_probe中sram_size的最小值限制逻辑，替代原有的if条件赋值。
series_name: crypto: cesa - use max to simplify mv_cesa_probe

title: crypto: atmel - use min3 to simplify atmel_sha_append_sg
summary: 使用 min3 宏合并两个 min 调用，并将 count 的无效值判断从 <=0 改为 ==0。
series_name: crypto: atmel - use min3 to simplify atmel_sha_append_sg

title: [v2] hwrng: core - Do not read data during PM sleep transition
summary: 在系统挂起/休眠过渡期间跳过硬件随机数读取，避免访问未就绪的设备。
series_name: [v2] hwrng: core - Do not read data during PM sleep transition

title: [2/2] crypto: tegra - Don't touch bo refcount in host1x bo pin/unpin
summary: 该补丁移除了Tegra SE驱动中cmdbuf的pin和unpin操作对host1x_bo引用计数的多余获取与释放。
series_name: Fix leaking of cached Host1x buffer objects

title: crypto: atmel-sha - use memcpy_and_pad to simplify hmac_setup
summary: 使用 memcpy_and_pad 函数替代 memcpy 与 memset 组合，简化 HMAC ipad 填充处理。
series_name: crypto: atmel-sha - use memcpy_and_pad to simplify hmac_setup

title: [v1] crypto: Use named initializers for struct i2c_device_id
summary: 将 i2c_device_id 结构体初始化从无名形式改为使用 .name 字段的命名初始化形式，涉及 atmel-ecc 和 atmel-sha204a 驱动。
series_name: [v1] crypto: Use named initializers for struct i2c_device_id

title: crypto: octeontx - use strscpy_pad in ucode_load_store
summary: 将固件加载存储函数中的手动长度检查和 strscpy 替换为 strscpy_pad，以简化代码并保证缓冲区末尾填充为零。
series_name: crypto: octeontx - use strscpy_pad in ucode_load_store

title: crypto: qat - protect service table iterations with service_lock
summary: 为`service_table`链表的遍历添加`service_lock`互斥锁保护，防止并发操作导致的竞态条件。
series_name: crypto: qat - protect service table iterations with service_lock

title: crypto: qat - use pci logging variants for PCI-specific messages
summary: 将QAT驱动中PCI相关错误信息的记录方式从`dev_err`统一替换为`pci_err`。
series_name: crypto: qat - use pci logging variants for PCI-specific messages

title: [v7,9/9] crypto: atmel: Use dmaengine_prep_config_sg() API
summary: 用 dmaengine_prep_config_sg() 替代 dmaengine_slave_config() 和 dmaengine_prep_slave_sg() 的分步调用，将 DMA 配置和描述符准备合并为一次操作。
series_name: dmaengine: Add new API to combine configuration and descriptor preparation

title: crypto: loongson - Select CRYPTO_RNG
summary: 为Loongson RNG驱动配置增加对CRYPTO_RNG的自动选择，确保依赖正确。
series_name: crypto: loongson - Select CRYPTO_RNG

title: [2/3] crypto: inside-secure: add EIP93 ESP packet backend
summary: 为 Inside Secure EIP93 加密驱动添加了 IPsec ESP 数据包硬件卸载后端支持。
series_name: Add packet-mode ESP offload for Airoha/EIP93

title: [1/2] crypto: Delete Qualcomm crypto engine driver
summary: 删除了Qualcomm加密引擎驱动程序及其所有配置选项和构建条目。
series_name: Delete the Qualcomm crypto engine

title: [v8,2/3] crypto: Migrate TPMKey ASN.1 objects from trusted-keys
summary: 将 TPM2 密钥的 ASN.1 对象定义与解码函数从 trusted-keys 子系统迁移到 crypto 子系统，新增 CRYPTO_TPM2_KEY 配置及 tpm2_key 编解码 API。
series_name: [v8,1/3] lib/asn1_encoder: Add asn1_encode_integer_bytes()

title: crypto: atmel-tdes - use min3 to simplify sg_copy and crypt_start
summary: 将两个连续的 `min` 调用替换为 `min3` 宏，简化 `sg_copy` 和 `crypt_start` 中的最小值计算逻辑。
series_name: crypto: atmel-tdes - use min3 to simplify sg_copy and crypt_start

title: crypto: use two-argument strscpy where destination size is known
summary: 将多个已知目标缓冲区大小的 `strscpy` 调用从三参数形式改为两参数形式。
series_name: crypto: use two-argument strscpy where destination size is known

title: crypto: qat - add KPT support for GEN6 devices
summary: 为 Intel QAT GEN6 设备新增密钥保护技术（KPT）支持，包括添加 sysfs 属性配置封装密钥数量、生存时间及共享模式，并初始化相关硬件数据。
series_name: crypto: qat - add KPT support for GEN6 devices

title: crypto: powerpc/aes - use min in ppc_{ecb,cbc,ctr,xts}_crypt
summary: 将 PowerPC AES 加密函数中的 `min_t(unsigned int, ...)` 替换为 `min` 宏，移除显式类型指定，利用类型安全的比较。
series_name: crypto: powerpc/aes - use min in ppc_{ecb,cbc,ctr,xts}_crypt

title: crypto: qat - simplify adf_service_mask_to_string helper
summary: 将服务名称字符串拼接逻辑改为仅从第二个元素开始添加分隔符，避免生成多余的前导分隔符。
series_name: crypto: qat - simplify adf_service_mask_to_string helper

title: crypto: loongson - Remove broken and unused loongson-rng
summary: 移除了已损坏且未使用的龙芯随机数生成器驱动 loongson-rng。
series_name: crypto: loongson - Remove broken and unused loongson-rng

title: [2/4] crypto: rockchip: Add RK356x/RK3588 cryptographic offloader driver
summary: 为 Rockchip RK356x/RK3588 SoC 新增硬件加密卸载器驱动。
series_name: crypto: rockchip: Add RK356x/RK3588 cryptographic

title: [v4] hwrng: virtio: clamp device-reported used.len at copy_data()
summary: 限制 virtio-rng 设备报告的 data_avail 不超过内部缓冲区大小，并检查 data_idx 越界，防止因恶意或 buggy 后端导致 slab 内存越界读取。
series_name: [v4] hwrng: virtio: clamp device-reported used.len at copy_data()

title: crypto: exynos-rng - Remove exynos-rng driver
summary: 移除 exynos-rng 伪随机数生成器驱动及其 Kconfig、Makefile、defconfig、MAINTAINERS 条目。
series_name: crypto: exynos-rng - Remove exynos-rng driver

title: [v2] crypto: atmel-tdes - use scatterlist length before DMA mapping
summary: 该补丁将 DMA 映射前的长度检查与计数由 sg_dma_len 改为直接使用 scatterlist 的 length 字段，以避免依赖映射后的 DMA 长度。
series_name: [v2] crypto: atmel-tdes - use scatterlist length before DMA mapping

title: [v3,2/2] hwrng: starfive: rework clk/reset teardown order for JHB100 & fix RPM
summary: 调整JHB100的时钟/复位拆除顺序以避免复位域穿越故障，并修复运行时电源管理支持。
series_name: hwrng: starfive: updates for jh7110-trng DT binding and driver fixes

title: crypto: amcc - check ppc4xx_trng_probe() return value
summary: 修改 ppc4xx_trng_probe 返回 int 以传递错误码，并在 crypto4xx_probe 中检查处理，失败时跳转错误路径。
series_name: crypto: amcc - check ppc4xx_trng_probe() return value

title: crypto: amcc - convert irq_of_parse_and_map to platform_get_irq
summary: 该补丁将 AMCC 加密驱动的中断获取从 `irq_of_parse_and_map` 替换为 `platform_get_irq`，并添加返回错误检查，同时将 irq 字段类型从 `u32` 改为 `int`。
series_name: crypto: amcc - convert irq_of_parse_and_map to platform_get_irq

title: crypto: talitos: replace in_be32/out_be32 with ioread32be/iowrite32be
summary: 将文件系统接口函数 in_be32/out_be32 替换为通用 ioread32be/iowrite32be，并在 Kconfig 中新增 COMPILE_TEST 与 HAS_IOMEM 依赖以支持跨平台编译测试。
series_name: crypto: talitos: replace in_be32/out_be32 with ioread32be/iowrite32be

title: crypto: omap - use min3 to simplify omap_crypto_copy_data
summary: 将偏移量和长度变量类型从 int 改为 size_t，并用 min3 宏替代两次 min 调用简化了 omap_crypto_copy_data 的长度计算。
series_name: crypto: omap - use min3 to simplify omap_crypto_copy_data

title: crypto: rng - Free default RNG on module exit
summary: 在加密模块退出时通过调用crypto_del_default_rng释放默认随机数生成器。
series_name: crypto: rng - Free default RNG on module exit

title: hwrng: omap - balance runtime PM and clocks on probe-defer paths
summary: 修复时钟获取延迟时直接返回导致的运行时PM与时钟资源未释放问题，改为跳转到错误处理路径进行清理。
series_name: hwrng: omap - balance runtime PM and clocks on probe-defer paths

title: [v5,1/1] crypto: atmel-ecc - fix multi-device use-after-free and registration races
summary: 通过全局锁和引用计数控制多设备对kpp算法的注册与注销，防止使用后释放和注册竞争。
series_name: [v5,1/1] crypto: atmel-ecc - fix multi-device use-after-free and registration races

title: crypto: ecc - Optimize vli additive operations using compiler builtins
summary: 使用编译器内建函数优化大整数加法和减法的进位/借位处理，以提升椭圆曲线运算的性能。
series_name: crypto: ecc - Optimize vli additive operations using compiler builtins

title: crypto: qat - cancel work on re-enable SR-IOV timeout
summary: 在 SR-IOV 重新启用超时后，取消未完成的 sriov_work 以避免挂起的工作项。
series_name: crypto: qat - cancel work on re-enable SR-IOV timeout

title: crypto: qat - clear AES key schedule from stack
summary: 在XTS密钥反转操作后调用memzero_explicit清除栈上的AES扩展密钥，防止密钥残留泄露。
series_name: crypto: qat - clear AES key schedule from stack

title: [v5,2/2] hwrng: starfive: rework clk/reset teardown order for JHB100
summary: 为JHB100重新设计时钟和复位拆除顺序，改为先禁用时钟再断言复位，以避免复位域交叉造成的毛刺影响下游IP。
series_name: hwrng: starfive: add JHB100 support and fix clk/reset teardown

title: lib/crypto: gf128hash: mark clmul32() as noinline_for_stack
summary: 将函数 clmul32 标记为 noinline_for_stack，以阻止编译器内联并控制栈空间使用。
series_name: lib/crypto: gf128hash: mark clmul32() as noinline_for_stack

title: crypto: atmel-ecc - reject hardware ECDH without a public key
summary: 在 atmel-ecc 驱动中增加对公钥是否为空的检查，若公钥缺失则拒绝硬件 ECDH 计算并返回 -EINVAL。
series_name: crypto: atmel-ecc - reject hardware ECDH without a public key

title: crypto: ti - Use list_first_entry_or_null() in dthe_get_dev()
summary: 将 `list_first_entry` 替换为 `list_first_entry_or_null`，使设备列表为空时安全返回 `NULL` 而非无效指针。
series_name: crypto: ti - Use list_first_entry_or_null() in dthe_get_dev()

title: crypto: s5p-sss - correct CONFIG_CRYPTO_DEV_EXYNOS_RNG macro name in comment
summary: 修正crypto/s5p-sss.c注释中宏名称CONFIG_EXYNOS_RNG为CONFIG_CRYPTO_DEV_EXYNOS_RNG。
series_name: crypto: s5p-sss - correct CONFIG_CRYPTO_DEV_EXYNOS_RNG macro name in comment

title: crypto: amcc - embed pdr_uinfo as flexible array in crypto4xx_device
summary: 将`struct crypto4xx_device`中的`pdr_uinfo`从独立动态分配的指针改为嵌入结构体尾部的柔性数组成员，`probe`时使用`struct_size`一次性分配，移除独立的`kzalloc_objs`和`kfree`调用。
series_name: crypto: amcc - embed pdr_uinfo as flexible array in crypto4xx_device

title: crypto: amcc: move ioremapping up
summary: 将 I/O 映射操作提前到 SDR 构建之前，使得映射失败时可直接返回，避免使用尚未存在的清理标签。
series_name: crypto: amcc: move ioremapping up

title: [v8,3/7] crypto/ccp: Disable CPU hotplug while SNP is active
summary: 在 SNP 初始化时禁用 CPU 热插拔，并在通过 snp_shutdown() 完全拆除 SNP 后重新启用，使用标志防止重复禁用/启用操作。
series_name: Add RMPOPT support.

title: crypto: hisilicon - Use more common code in sec_alg_skcipher_crypto()
summary: 该补丁将sec_alg_skcipher_crypto()函数中的错误处理路径重构为使用goto标签跳转到统一的内存释放点，消除重复的kfree和return语句。
series_name: crypto: hisilicon - Use more common code in sec_alg_skcipher_crypto()

title: crypto: virtio - bound the device-reported akcipher result
summary: 在计算非对称加密结果长度时，将其与原始目标缓冲区长度取最小值，防止设备返回的长度超出目标缓冲区。
series_name: crypto: virtio - bound the device-reported akcipher result

title: [v2] crypto: virtio - bound the akcipher result length
summary: 在 virtio_crypto 的 akcipher 回调中，将解密结果长度限制为计算长度与目标缓冲区两者的较小值，防止 dst_len 超出缓冲区边界。
series_name: [v2] crypto: virtio - bound the akcipher result length

title: crypto: af_alg - Add af_alg_restrict sysctl, defaulting to 1
summary: 引入 sysctl `af_alg_restrict` 控制 AF_ALG 接口限制级别，默认值 1 仅允许有限算法集，可设为 2 完全禁用。
series_name: crypto: af_alg - Add af_alg_restrict sysctl, defaulting to 1

title: hwrng: xilinx-trng: propagate timeout before any data is read
summary: 该补丁修改了返回类型和错误处理逻辑，确保在读取任何数据前发生超时能向上层返回错误码，而不是返回已读字节数0。
series_name: hwrng: xilinx-trng: propagate timeout before any data is read

title: crypto: algif_aead - stop recvmsg looping after a completed request
summary: 在AEAD和SKCIPHER的recvmsg循环中，当请求已完成且未设置MSG_MORE标志时，通过检查ctx->more和ctx->used来终止循环，防止输出缓冲区大于加密结果时陷入永不完成的阻塞等待。
series_name: crypto: algif_aead - stop recvmsg looping after a completed request

title: [23/32] hw_random/via-rng: Stop using 32-bit MSR interfaces
summary: 将via-rng驱动中的MSR访问从32位接口rdmsr/wrmsr切换为64位接口rdmsrq/wrmsrq，并使用msr结构体统一处理寄存器值。
series_name: x86/msr: Drop 32-bit MSR interfaces

title: [RFC] crypto: pcrypt - Disallow nesting of the pcrypt wrapper
summary: 在 pcrypt 初始化实例时检查算法的驱动名是否已包含 "pcrypt"，若已包含则禁止嵌套包装并返回错误码 -ELOOP。
series_name: [RFC] crypto: pcrypt - Disallow nesting of the pcrypt wrapper

title: crypto: talitos - fix several issues in the Freescale talitos crypto driver
summary: 修复several issues，提升子系统的稳定性和可靠性，防止潜在的内核异常或崩溃风险
qualified_titles: [v3,02/11] crypto: talitos - add chaining of arbitrary number of descriptor for the SEC1
[v3,03/11] crypto: talitos - move dma unmapping code in flush_channel() into a standalone dma_unmap_request() function
[v3,04/11] crypto: talitos - move dma mapping code in talitos_submit() into a standalone dma_map_request() function
[v3,05/11] crypto: talitos - move code in current_desc_hdr() into a standalone function
[v3,07/11] crypto: talitos/hash - use descriptor chaining for SEC1 instead of workqueue

title: SEV re-initialization fixes
summary: 修复相关功能缺陷或逻辑错误，确保操作行为符合预期规范，提升子系统的稳定性和可靠性，防止潜在的内核异常或崩溃风险
qualified_titles: [v2,1/4] crypto/ccp: Do not initialize SNP for SEV ioctls
[v2,2/4] crypto/ccp: Do not initialize SNP for ioctl(SNP_COMMIT)
[v2,3/4] crypto/ccp: Do not initialize SNP for ioctl(SNP_VLEK_LOAD)
[v2,4/4] crypto/ccp: Do not initialize SNP for ioctl(SNP_CONFIG)

title: hwrng: core - drop unnecessary forward declarations
summary: 移除unnecessary forward declarations，清理冗余或过时的代码，精简代码库规模，降低后续维护的复杂度和引入回归问题的风险
qualified_titles: [v2,2/4] hwrng: core - use bool for wait parameter in rng_get_data
[v2,3/4] hwrng: core - use MAX to simplify RNG_BUFFER_SIZE
[v2,4/4] hwrng: core - use sysfs_emit_at in rng_available_show

title: crypto: qat - remove unused ioctl interface
summary: 移除unused ioctl interface，清理冗余或过时的代码，精简代码库规模，降低后续维护的复杂度和引入回归问题的风险
qualified_titles: [v3,1/2] crypto: qat - remove unused character device and IOCTLs
